calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-27-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Steven B. Hanley, Esq. for Plaintiff Charles W. Hostler, Trustee of the Charles W. Hostler Trust.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations and Plaintiss's memorandum of points & authorities in support of default judgment, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant: Richard H. McKannay, Jr., and Lynn McKannay.
Declaratory Relief Judgment granted and signed in open court. See 2 pg. scanned doc. for details.
